creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like Maxmind knows about the 5.223.0.0/17 prefix, but not about 5.222.0.0/16.  That one doesn't appear in Hetzner's geofeed.csv either.

Could you please file a ticket with Hetzner to update their geofeed.csv and to let Maxmind know?  It works better when customers instigate this.  Thanks.

Meanwhile, I'll tune our GeoDNS to point those prefixes to our mirror in KL.

Thanks for letting us know.
